rulings.Case Title: BAYSIDE VILLAGE ASSOCIATES VS. VIKTOR VERNIKOV et al
rulings.Calendar Matter: Ntc Of Mtn And Mtn For Relief From Forfeiture
rulings.Rulings: Housing Court Law and Motion Calendar for Thursday, January 02, 2014 line 2(Part 1 of 2). DEFENDANT VIKTOR VERNIKOV, ALEXANDRA VERNIKOVA Ntc Of Mtn And Mtn For Relief From Forfeiture. DENIED without prejudice. No judgment for forfeiture (CCP 1174) or by operation f law (CCC 1951.2) has been entered, premature. = (501/HMD)

rulings.Case Title: BAYSIDE VILLAGE ASSOCIATES VS. VIKTOR VERNIKOV et al
rulings.Rulings: Housing Court Law and Motion Calendar for Thursday, January 02, 2014 line 2(Part 2 of 2). DEFENDANT VIKTOR VERNIKOV, ALEXANDRA VERNIKOVA DEMURRER TO 2ND AMENDED COMPLAINT. Sustained with leave to amend to address all issues raised in demurrer. Plaintiff's untimely opposition is stricken. = (501/HMD)
